에스겔 24:1.content: Again, in the ninth year, in the tenth month, in the tenth day of the month, Yahweh’s word came to me, saying,

에스겔 24:2.content: “Son of man, write the name of the day, this same day. The king of Babylon drew close to Jerusalem this same day.

에스겔 24:3.content: Utter a parable to the rebellious house, and tell them, ‘The Lord Yahweh says, “Put the cauldron on the fire. Put it on, and also pour water into it.

에스겔 24:4.content: Gather its pieces into it, even every good piece: the thigh and the shoulder. Fill it with the choice bones.

에스겔 24:5.content: Take the choice of the flock, and also a pile of wood for the bones under the cauldron. Make it boil well. Yes, let its bones be boiled within it.”

에스겔 24:6.content: “ ‘Therefore the Lord Yahweh says: “Woe to the bloody city, to the cauldron whose rust is in it, and whose rust hasn’t gone out of it! Take out of it piece after piece. No lot is fallen on it.

에스겔 24:7.content: “ ‘ “For her blood is in the middle of her. She set it on the bare rock. She didn’t pour it on the ground, to cover it with dust.

에스겔 24:8.content: That it may cause wrath to come up to take vengeance, I have set her blood on the bare rock, that it should not be covered.”

에스겔 24:9.content: “ ‘Therefore the Lord Yahweh says: “Woe to the bloody city! I also will make the pile great.

에스겔 24:10.content: Heap on the wood. Make the fire hot. Boil the meat well. Make the broth thick, and let the bones be burned.

에스겔 24:11.content: Then set it empty on its coals, that it may be hot, and its bronze may burn, and that its filthiness may be molten in it, that its rust may be consumed.

에스겔 24:12.content: She is weary with toil; yet her great rust, rust by fire, doesn’t leave her.

에스겔 24:13.content: “ ‘ “In your filthiness is lewdness. Because I have cleansed you and you weren’t cleansed, you won’t be cleansed from your filthiness any more, until I have caused my wrath toward you to rest.

에스겔 24:14.content: I, Yahweh, have spoken it. It will happen, and I will do it. I won’t go back. I won’t spare. I won’t repent. According to your ways, and according to your doings, they will judge you,” says the Lord Yahweh.’ ”

에스겔 24:15.content: Also Yahweh’s word came to me, saying,

에스겔 24:16.content: “Son of man, behold, I will take away from you the desire of your eyes with a stroke: yet you shall neither mourn nor weep, neither shall your tears run down.

에스겔 24:17.content: Sigh, but not aloud. Make no mourning for the dead. Bind your headdress on you, and put your sandals on your feet. Don’t cover your lips, and don’t eat mourner’s bread.”

에스겔 24:18.content: So I spoke to the people in the morning; and at evening my wife died. So I did in the morning as I was commanded.

에스겔 24:19.content: The people asked me, “Won’t you tell us what these things are to us, that you do so?”

에스겔 24:20.content: Then I said to them, “Yahweh’s word came to me, saying,

에스겔 24:21.content: ‘Speak to the house of Israel, “The Lord Yahweh says: ‘Behold, I will profane my sanctuary, the pride of your power, the desire of your eyes, and that which your soul pities; and your sons and your daughters whom you have left behind will fall by the sword.

에스겔 24:22.content: You will do as I have done. You won’t cover your lips or eat mourner’s bread.

에스겔 24:23.content: Your turbans will be on your heads, and your sandals on your feet. You won’t mourn or weep; but you will pine away in your iniquities, and moan one toward another.

에스겔 24:24.content: Thus Ezekiel will be a sign to you; according to all that he has done, you will do. When this comes, then you will know that I am the Lord Yahweh.’ ” ’ ”

에스겔 24:25.content: “You, son of man, shouldn’t it be in the day when I take from them their strength, the joy of their glory, the desire of their eyes, and that whereupon they set their heart, their sons and their daughters,

에스겔 24:26.content: that in that day he who escapes will come to you, to cause you to hear it with your ears?

에스겔 24:27.content: In that day your mouth will be opened to him who has escaped, and you will speak, and be no more mute. So you will be a sign to them. Then they will know that I am Yahweh.”
